title: Sales & Operation Branch Manager （UAE/Dubai) #80260
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Construction Industrial Machinery
  • Position Title: Sales & Operation Branch Manager
  • Working Location: Based in UAE/Dubai
  • Working Hours: 5.5 days
  • Salary Package: Up to SGD 6500 (Negotiable) + Incentive + Transport & Accommodation provided + Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent Role

Key Responsibilities

  • Oversee day-to-day operations, ensuring efficiency, productivity, and thorough quality control
  • Develop and implement sales strategies, identify new business opportunities, and secure projects to support company growth
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with key clients, contractors, and industry stakeholders, and serve as the main point of contact for client inquiries and project updates
  • Lead, coach, and motivate the sales team to achieve targets and enhance performance
  • Manage project timelines, resources, and budgets to ensure on-time and on-budget delivery while ensuring compliance with safety regulations and company policies
  • Prepare budgets, forecasts, and financial reports
  • Monitor project costs and revenues to ensure profitability, and advise on cost-effective practices
  • Negotiate contracts and agreements to ensure favorable terms
  • Facilitate effective communication between sales, operations, and on-site teams
  • Develop and monitor KPIs, conduct regular reviews, and implement process improvements.
  • Ensure that all operations comply with local regulations and company policies

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Min. ITE
  • Min. 3 years of working experience in Sales and Operations Management, preferably in the Construction Equipment Leasing
  • Proven track record of achieving sales targets and driving business growth
  • Experience in project management and overseeing large-scale projects
  • Understanding of the local market dynamics and cultural nuances

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #80260 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
